query:
*falco* cluster={{cluster}} output_fields rule priority output 
| json  "log.priority" as priority
| json  "log.rule" as rule
| json  "log.time" as time
| json  "$['log']['output_fields']['proc.cmdline']" as proc_cmdline nodrop
| json  "$['log']['output_fields']['proc.name']" as proc_name nodrop
| json  "$['log']['output_fields']['user.name']" as user_name nodrop
| json  "log.output" as output
| json "$['log']['output_fields']['k8s.ns.name']" as namespace
//| where !isEmpty(namespace)
| count as total by time,rule, priority, cluster, container, pod, namespace, proc_cmdline, proc_name, user_name,output
| fields time,rule, priority, cluster, container, pod, namespace, proc_cmdline, proc_name, user_name,output
| sort by time

sources.dashboardDescription: The Kubernetes - Security Overview Dashboard provides detailed information of anomalous activity, in addition it also provides details of the OOB Falco rules triggered by the activity on your infrastructure.

The Kubernetes - Security Overview Dashboard provides detailed information of anomalous activity, in addition it also provides details of the OOB Falco rules triggered by the activity on your infrastructure.
